description_long: This is a polygonal, metallic bucket with a faceted, angular design and a muted gray finish. The bucket features a single, robust handle attached to one side, which is also faceted and appears to be made from the same material as the main body. The rim is uneven and slightly jagged, giving it a utilitarian, industrial look. The interior is spacious and open, with no visible internal compartments or lining. There are no visible labels, markings, or decorative elements on the exterior, emphasizing its functional purpose. The bucket's structure suggests it is designed for carrying or holding materials, likely in an urban or industrial setting.
description: A faceted, gray metallic bucket with a single angular handle and an open, utilitarian design. The surface is matte and unmarked, emphasizing its industrial function.
description_view_0: The bucket is seen from a front angle, highlighting its angular rim and the absence of a handle on this side.
description_view_1: This view shows the bucket's handle clearly on the right, with the faceted body and open top visible.
description_view_2: The back of the bucket is shown, with the handle directly facing the viewer and the angular body wrapping around it.
description_view_3: A perspective from the left side, showing the handle on the left and the open, spacious interior.
